title: Iceberg std::length_error on DROP COLUMN
description:
### Describe the bug
Not related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/85845 because it requires `iceberg_use_version_hint = 1` setting in ClickHouse. The stack trace is also different.
### How to reproduce
Run [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22795042/spark.py), then in ClickHouse:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/t0/test/t0', format = 'Parquet') SETTINGS iceberg_use_version_hint = 1;
ALTER TABLE t0 DROP COLUMN c1; --std::length_error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'std::exception. Code: 1001, type: std::length_error, e.what() = basic_string (version 25.10.1.2084 (official build)), Stack trace:
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: std::logic_error::logic_error(char const*) @ 0x0000000028873d74
1. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/stdexcept:151: std::length_error::length_error[abi:se190107](char const*) @ 0x000000000d31c9c9
2. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/stdexcept:240: std::__throw_length_error[abi:se190107](char const*) @ 0x000000000d31c95f
3. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/string:2233: ? @ 0x000000000d31c90d
4. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/string:2441: void String::__init_with_size[abi:se190107]<std::__wrap_iter<char const*>, std::__wrap_iter<char const*>>(std::__wrap_iter<char const*>, std::__wrap_iter<char const*>, unsigned long) @ 0x0000000014af3f0b
5. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/string:2430: DB::Iceberg::isTemporaryMetadataFile(String const&) @ 0x0000000018e466de
6. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/Utils.cpp:111: DB::Iceberg::getMetadataFileAndVersion(String const&) @ 0x0000000018e3c207
7. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/Utils.cpp:208: DB::Iceberg::writeMetadataFileAndVersionHint(String const&, String const&, String const&, String, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, DB::CompressionMethod, bool) @ 0x0000000018e3bad0
8. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/Mutations.cpp:642: DB::Iceberg::alter(DB::AlterCommands const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::shared_ptr<DB::IObjectStorage>, std::shared_ptr<DB::StorageObjectStorageConfiguration>) @ 0x0000000018e00de0
9. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/Iceberg/IcebergMetadata.cpp:531: DB::IcebergMetadata::alter(DB::AlterCommands const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x0000000018d882db
10. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/DataLakes/DataLakeConfiguration.h:161: DB::DataLakeConfiguration<DB::StorageLocalConfiguration, DB::IcebergMetadata>::alter(DB::AlterCommands const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) @ 0x0000000016cf6833
11. src/Storages/ObjectStorage/StorageObjectStorage.cpp:623: DB::StorageObjectStorage::alter(DB::AlterCommands const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>, std::unique_lock<std::timed_mutex>&) @ 0x0000000018b317f0
12. src/Interpreters/InterpreterAlterQuery.cpp:254: DB::InterpreterAlterQuery::executeToTable(DB::ASTAlterQuery const&) @ 0x000000001a65fb33
13. src/Interpreters/InterpreterAlterQuery.cpp:82: DB::InterpreterAlterQuery::execute() @ 0x000000001a65c9cd
14. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1603: DB::executeQueryImpl(char const*, char const*, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum, std::unique_ptr<DB::ReadBuffer, std::default_delete<DB::ReadBuffer>>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST>&, std::shared_ptr<DB::ImplicitTransactionControlExecutor>, std::function<void ()>) @ 0x000000001aa45c02
15. src/Interpreters/executeQuery.cpp:1812: DB::executeQuery(String const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context>, DB::QueryFlags, DB::QueryProcessingStage::Enum) @ 0x000000001aa3f8b2
16. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:743: DB::TCPHandler::runImpl() @ 0x000000001e30e06e
17. src/Server/TCPHandler.cpp:2754: DB::TCPHandler::run() @ 0x000000001e3279a4
18. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerConnection.cpp:40: Poco::Net::TCPServerConnection::start() @ 0x0000000024188507
19. base/poco/Net/src/TCPServerDispatcher.cpp:115: Poco::Net::TCPServerDispatcher::run() @ 0x0000000024188ae5
20. base/poco/Foundation/src/ThreadPool.cpp:205: Poco::PooledThread::run() @ 0x0000000024127c7f
21. base/poco/Foundation/src/Thread_POSIX.cpp:341: Poco::ThreadImpl::runnableEntry(void*) @ 0x0000000024125351
22. start_thread @ 0x00000000000a27f1
23. __clone3 @ 0x0000000000133b5c
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), age SMALLINT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (name, age, created_at) VALUES ('Alice', 30, NOW()), ('Bob', NULL, NOW());
CREATE TABLE t2 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, description VARCHAR(255), amount FLOAT8);
INSERT INTO t2 (id, description, amount) SELECT id, name || ' - ' || age::TEXT AS description, age * 1.5 FROM t1 WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE t1 DROP COLUMN age;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN with iceberg_use_version_hint = 1
